programme.title: Dressed to Kill

programme.title: Winter Ridge

programme.title: The Call Up

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Harvesting Murder

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Roasts and Ghosts

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Stage Fright
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, the team heads to Rapids Theater in Niagara Falls, New York where a lonely actress hanged herself backstage. The staff believes her spirit has never left and is haunting the theater.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Murdered Matron
programme.desc: Special guest investigator Meredith Vieira joins the TAPS team, as they investigate Sailors' Snug Harbor in Staten Island, New York. Once a retirement home to weathered seaman, it's now home to the spirit of a murdered matron.

programme.desc: King Solomon ruled Israel 3,000 years ago, famed for a visit from the Queen of Sheba. The quest for Solomon's gold spans millennia. Karl Mauch believed he found Ophir in southern Africa. Yet, the search for Solomon's true mines persists.

programme.title: Arthur: Unfinished/D.W., Bossy Boots

programme.title: Arthur: The Director's Cut/Crime and Consequences

programme.title: Arthur: Carried Away/Dueling Detectives!
programme.desc: Kate and Mei Lin are thrilled to tour the solar system with Pal's cousin, Dr. Yowl. Wally is missing and Elwood City's best detective is on the case. And that detective is…Binky?!?

programme.title: Arthur: Muffy's Soccer Shocker/Brother, Can You Spare A Clarinet?
programme.desc: Muffy's proud that her dad is the new soccer coach--until he exhausts the team with demanding drills. The try-outs for the Young Person's Orchestra are coming to Lakewood Elementary and everyone agrees that Binky is a shoe-in.

programme.title: Arthur: Hic or Treat/Mr. Alwaysright
programme.desc: D.W. gets a case of the hiccups that just won't go away. Will she have them for the rest of her life and set the world record? It seems that Brain is always right about everything and it's really starting to get on Buster's nerves.

programme.title: Arthur: Sue Ellen's Lost Diary/Arthur's Knee
programme.desc: Poor Sue Ellen has lost the one thing she's never without--her diary. Then, Arthur's hurt his knee but won't tell Mom--because then she'd know he'd been playing down at the dump , where he was NOT allowed to go.

programme.title: Arthur: The Case of the Girl with the Long Face/The Substitute Arthur
programme.desc: Fern's been feeling low and no one can figure out why. Luckily, Buster Baxter is on the case! With Arthur out of town, Buster is on the hunt for a new best friend, but he only wants to play games HIS way. Will Buster learn to compromise?

programme.title: Arthur: Carl's Concerto/Too Much of a Good Thing
programme.desc: Carl has agreed to play the accordion for George's puppet show. But his routines are getting in the way of rehearsals. Buster enlists Binky's help to keep him from gorging on delicious Tuvaluna cookies. Will Buster's self-control crumble?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Birthday/Francine Frensky, Superstar
programme.desc: Only four more days until Arthur's birthday party! But to Arthur's horror, it turns out Muffy's having her birthday party on the very same day. And, now that Francine finally has the lead in a school play, she's has become a stage tyrant.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Operation Mercury
programme.desc: After British forces withdrew in defeat from Greece to the island of Crete in early 1941, they were soon fighting German invasion armies again. This time, 5,000 of Hitler's elite paratroopers landed to complete their conquest in the Mediterranean.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: The Battle of Malta (June 1941)
programme.desc: In 1941, Mussolini desperately wants to wrest the tiny island of Malta from the British for control of the Mediterranean. When his inadequate air force fails to bomb the Maltese into submission, Hitler's Luftwaffe joins the campaign.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: The Fall of Singapore (October 1941)
programme.desc: Before the sneak attack on Pearl Harbor, the Japanese initiate the Pacific War by firing on the British in Malaya. Their route to the rubber-rich nation takes them into Singapore, the World's most armed fortress.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Pearl Harbor (December 7, 1941)
programme.desc: During a two-hour surprise attack on the American Pacific fleet anchored at Pearl Harbor, Japanese navy pilots score a near-complete victory.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Fall of the Philippines
programme.desc: Examining the Japanese invasion of the Philippines in December 1941.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: The Battle of Midway (June 2, 1942)
programme.desc: Only one isolated atoll prevents an enemy invasion of Hawaii. Midway Island is where the Japanese fleet converges on a tiny American base with a massive strafing and bombing attack.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: The Solomon Islands (July 1942)
programme.desc: For the first time since Americans entered the war, Marines face Japanese infantrymen at Guadal Canal. In the jungles, two powerful armies clash in a six month battle that claims nearly 30,000 lives.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Battle of Dieppe
programme.desc: The Allies launch an ill-fated attack on the German-occupied port of Dieppe, France.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Battle of Stalingrad
programme.desc: German forces encounter Russian resistance.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: El Alamein
programme.desc: Erwin Rommel battles Allied forces in North Africa in 1942.

programme.title: Hitler & Churchill: The Eagle & The Lion

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: B25: The mighty North American twin delivered the first blow in the fight back against Japan, in one of the most daring and audacious raids of all time.

programme.title: Hitler's Engineers

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour

programme.title: The Sound And The Fury

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: For many people, the most credible UFO reports are those raised by law enforcement. We investigate the most significant reports from police records.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 10
programme.desc: In 2011, a vault of US government files about UFO sightings and alien activity was released. This series investigates these documents and re-examines key evidence about UFOs, alien abductions and government cover-ups.

programme.title: Dynasty: Domestic Intrigue
programme.desc: Blake offers to help Amanda find her father. Claudia goes out with Dean on a dinner, while Steven rejects Luke. Jeff ends up sleeping with Nicole. Dominique goes to Istanbul to meet with Rashid Ahmed.

programme.title: Dynasty: Kristina
programme.desc: Krystle goes into premature labor and delivers a baby girl, who suffers from respiratory problems. She names the child Kristina after a friend who once saved her life. Claudia is uneasy when Steven accompanies Luke on a business trip.

programme.title: Dynasty: Swept Away
programme.desc: Upon learning that he may be Amanda's father, Blake resolves to ask Amanda to take a blood test. Nicole tells Jeff there's a chance Peter DeVilbis may have been with another woman at the time of the crash.

programme.title: Dynasty: That Holiday Spirit
programme.desc: Blake buys back his racehorse Allegre from owner Daniel Reece, who sends Krystle a gift. Furious, she demands to know how he dare approach her after what happened with her sister, Iris. Amanda learns she is Blake's daughter.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Avenger
programme.desc: Krystle reconciles with Daniel, who reveals that his break-up with her sister was amicable. Claudia moves into La Mirage. Krystle confides to Steven that Daniel is Sammy Jo's father and therefore little Danny's grandfather.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Will
programme.desc: Claudia rebuffs Steven's conciliatory attempts. Tension between Dex and Amanda continues to mount. On his deathbed, Tom Carrington makes amends with Blake, and in a final dramatic gesture, has his will changed.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Daisy & Marcus
programme.desc: Daisy met Marcus on Instagram and he instantly stole her heart. But Marcus won't speak to Daisy on the phone, let alone meet her in person, so Nev and Tyler try to arrange a face to face.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Chitara & Priscilla
programme.desc: Chitara took a big leap and came out to her family when she met Priscilla online, but Priscilla ended their relationship unexpectedly. Now Chitara is determined to find out what happened.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Felipe & Jasmine
programme.desc: Single father Felipe is ready to settle down with Jasmine. However, the two have been talking online for eight months and have never met. Max returns and joins Nev to investigate.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike & Kristen
programme.desc: Mike met Kristen on Facebook. They quickly forged a deep connection, but Mike's frequent efforts to meet Kristen have been futile. Will Mike finally get face-to-face with Kristen?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jesse & Brian
programme.desc: Jesse met Brian online. They made plans to meet, but Brian stood her up. Now, years later, Brian has asked her to live with him. But, she can't stop wondering - what is Brian hiding?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Artis & Jess
programme.desc: Five months ago Artis met Jess online. Artis and Jess each were in relationships, but believed they'd found true love. But is Jess everything that she says she is?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Ashley & Mike
programme.desc: For over seven years, Ashley has sent dramatically altered photos of herself to her soul mate, Mike, to make her look thinner and more attractive to him.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Baby Steps
programme.desc: Amber wants to put an end to the fighting and move away from Gary. Farrah can't stand living under her parents' roof anymore. Maci struggles to keep up in school when her son starts walking.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Happy Birthday
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler work on letting go of Carly, while Tyler works up the nerve to propose. Maci and Ryan celebrate Bentley's first birthday, and Amber plans a party for Leah.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Phoenix Lights

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets the owners of an abnormal humanoid skull allegedly discovered in Mexico in the 1930s and a researcher who has had the skull subjected to numerous tests including carbon-14 dating, and DNA in order to determine it’s origin.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Night Fire

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: The key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Arthur: The Boy With His Head In The Clouds/More!

programme.title: Arthur: Fright Night/Citizen Cheikh

programme.title: Arthur: April 9th

programme.title: Arthur: Do You Speak George?/World Girls
programme.desc: Everyone at school is speaking their own made-up language, and George can't make sense of what anyone is saying. And it's the grand opening of World Girl World, which sells dolls from every country, and every girl in town is thrilled!

programme.desc: The Japanese meet resistance from British forces as they advance through Burma to take India in 1944.

programme.desc: American bombers target a Romanian oil refinery in a daring 1943 mission.

programme.desc: Bloody fighting erupts on a group of tiny Pacific islands in November 1943.

programme.desc: Examining the battle at the Kwajelein Atoll in the South Pacific during 1944. Included: operations by the Seabees.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Crack
programme.desc: With the kids befriending and welcoming him, the Autobots deeply suspicious of him, and driven by his need to kill Megatron, the deeply conflicted Starscream trusts Thrust and returns to the moon base with the Star Sabre and Skyboom Shield.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Awakening
programme.desc: The massive Tidalwave joins the Decepticons, but is, seemingly, defeated in battle by Hot Shot and Blurr. Alexis discovers three new minicons, which Sideways says combine to create another ultimate weapon, the Requiem Blaster.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: In Naroom's forest, the kids are heading toward a giant obelisk, a structure which the Book of Elders says contains the Naroomi Dreamstone. On route, our trio are packing up camp when Tony starts having seeing things from his Earth life.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: During a race at the floating Neptune Islands, the team encounters a squadron of old bomber jets that disappear in front of their eyes. The local urban legend says they are a ghostly squadron of jets that are trying to find their way home.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Union
programme.desc: The only way to defeat Unicron is to wake the minicons inside him and attack from within as well as without. Red Alert and the kids use the portal to travel to Unicron's core.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Skor plans to flatten Megalopolis with a massive, 60-story tall rock, but he suddenly has no one to help him push the rock down his mountain. His normally-subservient army of Links has run off in disgust over being fed the wrong meal at lunchtime.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Three Lines, Three Corners
programme.desc: Barney and his friends play hopscotch—with a twist. Whitney is learning about triangles at school, so Angela created Triangle Hopscotch to help reinforce "triangles."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Making a Move
programme.desc: Welcome to the neighborhood! Anna has just moved to the neighborhood and is missing her old friends. Barney and his friends help her discover that moving is an adventure with new places to explore and new friends to meet.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Home Sweet Earth
programme.desc: It's Earth Day, a great time for everyone to learn how to help take car of our world, but Ben is wasting paper while BJ isn't too concerned about cutting down a tree to make room for a new playground.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Imagine That!
programme.desc: While Baby Bop and BJ are pretending to be pirates, Barney creates a magical island for their fantastic adventure. Together they discover ways to have fun while playing dress up, pretending, and being silly.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ’s efforts to decorate the park go awry when he accidentally paints the caboose several different colors. Baby Bop can’t wait for BJ and Riff to go on their camping trip.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Bird of a Different Feather
programme.desc: Barney takes the kids to Hawaii on a quest for a bird of paradise. While there, they meet some friends, learn new Hawaiian words, make a Hawaiian lei and dance a hula! Eventually, Barney and his friends find a bird of paradise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Here Kitty, Kitty
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ and Baby Bop get into a debate of which is better: the sun or the wind. Rachel learns that the park is not only a place to come and play but it's also the home of many different creatures.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The New Kid - The Princess And The Frog
programme.desc: When Riff meets a new friend in the park, BJ feels a little left out. BJ goes to great lengths to try to find a new friend for himself. Barney helps BJ see that we don't have to forget old friends when we make new ones.

programme.title: The Raccoons

programme.title: The Raccoons

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Becoming Shiva (REDUX)
programme.desc: A Terran terrorist group protesting the ecological disasters that have plagued them detonate a bomb on the city state space station, Ring Sheppard. The crew are hired to track them down and break the ring up. More easily said than done.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: The Third Thing (REDUX)

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Torment (REDUX)

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Painless (REDUX)

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Might Have Been

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Bad Moon
programme.desc: As a full moon hangs over the city, the rookies are unnerved by a series of strange occurrences. While investigating the theft of three severed heads, Andy and Swarek pick up the trail of a mentally unstable man who has stopped taking his medication

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: In a society controlled by aliens, a mother rebels when she is forced to give up her child to Mother, a wise alien who acts as a parent to all infants. Determined to get the child back, she embarks upon a dangerous quest that will change her world.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Two brothers wrestle for control of their father's million-dollar pharmaceutical company. But when one brother discovers a drug which may hold the secret to eternal life, the battle for control becomes a rapid trip toward self-destruction.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A dying race of aliens come to Earth to stop its own extinction…by reanimating human corpses. But a government doctor (Mykelti Williamson) senses that there may be more to their plans than mere survival! D. W. Moffett and Rae Dawn Chong also star.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: An experiment at St. Peter's Hospital threatens the natural order of things when an embittered billionaire (William Hickey) pays a brilliant cardiologist (Bruce Davidson) to help him cheat death. But is death willing to be cheated so easily?

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Aggie (Thora Birch) is an outcast at her elementary school because strange things seem to happen around her. When she is suspended from school, her parents hire a nanny who seems too good to be true. Will they lose their only child to keep her safe?

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Thomas Infante
programme.desc: Lisa and Thomas Infante were childhood sweethearts who grew up on the same street. It seemed inevitable they would end up together. But their marriage was volatile, and when one of them found love elsewhere, the consequences would be fatal.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Malcolm Webster
programme.desc: The women in Malcolm Webster’s life seemed prone to bad luck. One died in a car crash. Another suffered a mysterious illness. A third, a keen sailor, found her life jacket punctured. How long before police realised this was more than coincidence?

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Stephen Searle
programme.desc: Stephen and Anne Searle were the grandparents at the helm of a large, close-knit family. But Stephen was having an affair, and Anne had been pushed to drink by her husband’s controlling behaviour. Neither was destined to enjoy a peaceful retirement.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ann Marie Anastasi
programme.desc: Ann Marie and Anthony Anastasi had four children, a big house on a desirable street… and a younger lover living in their basement. It was a toxic love triangle, and one that was destined to end in tragedy.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Hannegret Donnelly
programme.desc: The Donnelly family’s neighbours knew they were unusual. Christopher and Hannegret were rarely seen outside the house, and the children were home-schooled. But no one could guess the violence taking place within their home - until it was too late.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Iain Lawrence
programme.desc: Ian and Sally Lawrence were a glamorous couple, and they looked like they had it all. But their marriage suffered when Ian’s star started to fall as Sally’s career rocketed. And when the couple suffered a terrible car crash, only one came out alive.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Playing With Fire
programme.desc: Vernetta is stalked by her abusive ex-husband, Richard, after she kicks him out of the house. When Richard threatens murder, Vernetta must face the fight of her life.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Predator By Proxy
programme.desc: After Angell kicks her ex-husband Michael out of the house, he returns for revenge. Michael creates fake advertisements that send strange men right to Angell's door.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Without A Trace
programme.desc: When Pam Dunn finally breaks free from her abusive relationship with Dave, things go from bad to worse as Dave relentlessly stalks and threatens her.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Sex & Malice
programme.desc: After Ann Moulds is bombarded with sadistic letters from an anonymous stalker, she tries to get help from police. But with no stalking laws in Scotland, she's at her stalker's mercy.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Puppet Master
programme.desc: Christy Martin is the toughest female boxer in the world. But outside the ring, Christy deals with the fight of her life as she's blackmailed and abused by her husband...who is also her coach.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Ties that Blind
programme.desc: Kathy is thrilled when her husband David treats her well, as he often beats her down with insults and abuse. When Kathy tries to escape her marriage, David is not about to let her go.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Double Cross

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hijacked

programme.title: 72 Hours: Six Feet Under

programme.title: 72 Hours: Nightmare

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: To improve the camp's inspection rating, Klink transfers in a stern German sergeant who quickly makes life miserable for staff and prisoners alike with his overly strict and unwavering adherence to all regulations. All want him gone.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Allies give Hogan a solo mission: attend a baron's party as Commandant Klink. Burkhalter gets involved when he learns that Klink's name sits at the very top of the guest list.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink nabs a spy, so Hogan takes the focus off his catch by making Klink think someone's trying to kill the commandant himself, leading Klink to have Hogan become a decoy commandant.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Bumbling British Colonel Crittendon again disrupts Hogan's plans to get out an Allied officer who is also named Crittendon.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Germans have whipped up a plot to send German pilots in RAF fighters to shoot down British bombers.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: To help the Allied invasion at Normandy,Hogan convinces the Germans that Klink has been promoted to Chief of Staff.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Do Unto Others
programme.desc: Dog is a rough, tough bounty hunter, but he's a softie at heart, as the two cases in this episode show.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A Helping Hand
programme.desc: Dog answers two very different calls for help from women. In the first case, he helps Leland protect Maria, who's being threatened by her violent husband. Then Dog visit a young woman who's dying and has asked to see Dog as one of her final wishes.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Take Your Daughter to Work Day
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa, who's just turned 18 and is studying to become a bondsman, gets to do some on-the-job training when she helps Dog hunt for Wayne, who's run out on a bond for second-degree assault.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: In Sickness and In Health
programme.desc: Dog is sick as a dog, but he still must lead the hunt for a fugitive named James. James' girlfriend tries to cover for him, but Dog surprises James in his bedroom and leads him away in cuffs.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: If the Shirt Fits...
programme.desc: Beth buys Dog a shirt with an embroidered chicken, but Dog explains he only wears shirts with pictures of either Jesus or a Harley-Davidson. When it's time to go to work, the team goes after Necia, a fugitive with felony charges pending.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Thief Who Stole Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas day, and Dog sets out to nab Raymond, who robs to support his ice habit, and give him a little Christmas gift - shiny new handcuffs.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rock-a-Bye Bounty
programme.desc: Dog and Beth must go after their former housekeeper, Lisa, who's jumped bond. They know this case will be tricky because Lisa knows everyone in the family. Luckily, Beth's nephew, Jason, is visiting and is quickly put to work as the bait.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Father-Hood
programme.desc: Before Tim heads out for a tough day of bounty hunting, he likes to get in a little quality time with his daughter, Summer Rain.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cops and Criminals
programme.desc: After giving a rousing speech to an audience of enthusiastic grade-schoolers, Dog catches up with an old friend, Sheriff Tommy Cayetano, to talk business. Dog's got a tough fugitive, named Mia, to catch and Tommy is happy to lend a hand.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cupid in Cuffs
programme.desc: It's the day before Valentine's Day and love is in the air at Da Kine Bail Bonds--but not for Tapi who has failed to appear in court on theft charges. Dog's plan is to have Leland knock on Tapi's door with a Valentine's gift to draw her out.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Uneasy Rider
programme.desc: Willie puts Little Will on a budget for his first car but it backfires when Will decides to get a motorcycle instead. Jase and the guys are inspired to design a product using zip lines that will revolutionize duck hunting.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Good Willie Hunting
programme.desc: While many of the guys' wives and children are in Africa doing charity work, Willie and Jase get into a debate over tracking ability which leads to a challenge--can Jase and Si track and capture Willie and Jep?

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Sleep Cover
programme.desc: With Korie still in Africa, Willie and Jep must step in and supervise Bella's sleepover. When a couple boys play a prank on the girls, Willie and Jep prove to be the perfect chaperones for the task.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drive-In Revivin'
programme.desc: Korie challenges Willie to come up with a romantic gesture without spending any money. Missy and Jase compete to see who can find a girlfriend for Mountain Man.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Fishful Thinking
programme.desc: Jase's hopes to win the inaugural Duck Commander Fishing Tournament is buoyed when he is able to enlist the help of legendary angler Bill Dance. Meanwhile, Willie's vanity over his greying beard leads him to make a questionable decision.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: When Doves Fry
programme.desc: Jase and Jep make a deal with Mia and Merritt to get them to go dove hunting with them. Si tries to make some extra cash by starting a West Monroe tour.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Carpnado
programme.desc: Jumping Asian carp have invaded Monroe's waters so Jase and the guys set out to try to stop them from spreading further. Meanwhile, Willie and Si have to run Willie's Duck Diner for the day.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Campfire Diaries
programme.desc: The family spends a weekend at their childhood summer camp, reliving old memories and working to repair a tennis court Willie built twenty years ago. While at the camp, Jep tries to pass a lifeguard swimming test he failed as a teenager.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Rowdy's Big Day
programme.desc: Rowdy's adoption is finalized and he officially becomes a Robertson. Jase gets his first massage and enjoys it more than he expected.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Disappearing Acts
programme.desc: After Willie and Jase lose Si's tea cup, Si makes them go to great lengths to find it. When the entertainment for Gus's 1st birthday party falls through, Jep fills in as a magician.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Dance Dads
programme.desc: Willie, Korie, Jase and Missy take dance lessons from Sadie to prepare for Reed and Rebecca's upcoming weddings. Jase's plan to perform Reed's wedding ceremony may fall through when he waits until the last minute to renew his ordainment.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Sail Away
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark assist a novelist who's given up. Also, they motivate the man's grandson, who has yet to tap into his literary potential.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Children's Children
programme.desc: A reporter uncovers a secret about the past of a woman who runs a home for unwed mothers.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Friends
programme.desc: While working as a substitute teacher at a high school, Jonathan assigns an overweight girl to tutor a troubled baseball star.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Special Love - Part 1
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark persuade a youngster with Down's Syndrome to join the Special Olympics.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Special Love - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark's friend Scotty wants to adopt the boy with Down's Syndrome. A custody battle occurs with the biological parents.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 10
programme.desc: In 2011, a vault of US government files about UFO sightings and alien activity was released. This series investigates these documents and re-examines key evidence about UFOs, alien abductions and government cover-ups.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 11
programme.desc: In 2011, a vault of US government files about UFO sightings and alien activity was released. This series investigates these documents and re-examines key evidence about UFOs, alien abductions and government cover-ups.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 9
programme.desc: We have always been told that mankind enjoys free will. Is this really true or have aliens created the means for controlling humanity?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: As the world continues to evolve into the digital age, people are capturing images in the sky that they are unable to explain.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: While many UFO sightings occur in rural locations with only a single eyewitness, there have been sightings over cities witnessed by hundreds.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 8
programme.desc: Take a fresh look at some classic alien encounters, UFOs and abductions, and discover several new stories.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Will
programme.desc: Claudia rebuffs Steven's conciliatory attempts. Tension between Dex and Amanda continues to mount. On his deathbed, Tom Carrington makes amends with Blake, and in a final dramatic gesture, has his will changed.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Treasure
programme.desc: Krystle begins working with Daniel. Blake is adamantly opposed and exchanges harsh words with Reece. Dex is furious with Alexis for traveling to Sumatra to see Blake's father. Alexis learns from Amanda of Dex's experience with Daniel in Vietnam.

programme.title: Dynasty: Foreign Relations
programme.desc: Krystle launches her new business with the purchase of an Arabian horse. Sexual tension between Steven and Luke mounts. Jeff and Nikki return from Bolivia with the news of their marriage and they move into the mansion.

programme.title: Dynasty: Triangles
programme.desc: Blake returns triumphant from his negotiations with the Chinese. Alexis vows to buy into the venture. Krystle, uncomfortable with Daniel's increasing attention, avoids him. Blake invites Amanda to accompany him on a business trip to Acapulco.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Ball
programme.desc: Alexis attempts to persuade the head of the Chinese delegation to hire Colbyco. Blake is surprised to learn Lady Ashley is an Acapulco. Amanda has a romantic fling with Prince Michael of Moldavia. Krystle makes a surprise visit to Daniel.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Ashley & Mike
programme.desc: For over seven years, Ashley has sent dramatically altered photos of herself to her soul mate, Mike, to make her look thinner and more attractive to him.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Aaliyah & Alicia
programme.desc: Aaliyah has been able to share her life struggles with Alicia. However, despite living only 70 blocks away, Alicia refuses to meet her as she hasn't come out to her friends and family yet.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Nick & Melissa

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Keyonnah & Bow Wow

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike & Caroline
programme.desc: Mike fell in love with Caroline online. He grew suspicious when she continually evaded meeting him, yet left notes at his car. Is Caroline an imposter or is she just afraid?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: The religious practice known as exorcism is examined as well as claims of demonic possession. Richard travels to a Catholic seminary in Yonkers, New York.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Fluoride
programme.desc: The Conspiracy Show investigates the safety and efficacy of putting fluoride in our water supply. Dentists say that putting fluoride in the water supply prevents tooth decay, but some researchers claim it's a toxic substance that causes cancer.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: An investigation into the various conspiracy theories revolving around the tragic death of Diana, The People's Princess, in Paris in August 1997.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Pterodactyls
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several explorers and cryptozoologists who believe pterodactyls, flying dinosaurs thought to have become extinct some 60 million years ago, are alive and thriving in remote places such as Papua New Guinea.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Global Warming, A Hoax?
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several journalists and researchers who argue the theory that human use of carbon-based fossil fuels will lead to catastrophic global warming.

programme.title: UFOTV Presents: The Secret: Evidence We Are Not Alone
programme.desc: This story and the trail of scientific discovery that followed proves that the official US government position on UFOs has been, and still is, a carefully orchestrated deception designed to hide the most extraordinary secret in recorded history.

programme.title: UFOTV Presents: The Silent Revolution of Truth
programme.desc: The award-winning film documents the amazing, true-life adventures of Billy Meier, the only proven UFO contactee.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside The ROM, Toronto
programme.desc: From a medieval hand-grenade to an extremely rare dinosaur, discover the secrets inside the Royal Ontario Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Egyptian Museum
programme.desc: From the mystery of a Pharaoh’s gold to the strange practice of animal mummification, discover the secrets inside the Egyptian Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Hermitage Museum
programme.desc: From ancient mummies who sport tattoos to re-examining who really killed Rasputin, discover the secrets inside the State Hermitage Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Topkapi Palace Museum, Istanbul
programme.desc: From assassins who plot to poison a Sultan to bitter enemies who sign the world’s first peace treaty, discover the secrets inside the Topkapi Palace Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Louvre
programme.desc: From murdered kings to stolen masterpieces, discover the secrets inside the Louvre.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: AIR, LAND AND SEA
programme.desc: Planes, trains and ships, our mass transit systems, have had a profound effect on mankind, making the world smaller and more connected.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: HURRICANES
programme.desc: Hurricanes, Typhoons and Cyclones all the same thing with different names – what they also have in common is their destructive power! Hurricanes are large, swirling storms and winds from a hurricane can damage buildings or trees.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: TORNADO
programme.desc: A tornado is a violently rotating column of air extending from the base of a thunderstorm down to the ground. Tornadoes are capable of completely destroying well-made structures, uprooting trees, and hurling objects through the air like deadly missiles.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: VOLCANOES
programme.desc: Volcanoes are Earth’s geologic architects. They’ve created more than 80 percent of our planet’s surface and their explosive force has crafted both mountains and craters.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MANMADE
programme.desc: When it comes to disasters, mother nature has mankind beat. However, as mankind expands, evolves and technology advances, it comes with dangerous challenges. When errors are made or unforeseen circumstances occur, the results can be devastating.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: The key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone
programme.desc: Mercury is one Earth's closest neighbors, but for centuries it eluded astronomer's best efforts to learn its secrets. But that has changed thanks to missions like Mariner and most recently, Messenger.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient sky watchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: Throughout history, our nightly view of the universe has fueled our collective imagination. When it comes to the Big Bang, not even the most creative work of imagination can rival what science has revealed about the birth of the universe.

programme.title: Earthrise: The First Lunar Voyage
programme.desc: Interviews with Apollo 8 astronauts, their wives, mission control staff, and journalists give true insider's perspective to the space race of the late 1960's.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.desc: To excel in science, the class has to prove that they have P.A.N.T.S.--the ability to be patient, attentive, nosy, thoughtful, and systematic. And Muffy starts an advice column to launch her career as a rich and famous talk-show host.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Plays The Blues/Buster's Sweet Success
programme.desc: Arthur's beloved piano teacher is retiring, but she assures him that the new teacher is outstanding--and famous, too! When Buster signs up to sell candy for the band, he figures it's easy money -- who doesn't love chocolate?

programme.title: Arthur: Castles in the Sky/Tipping the Scales
programme.desc: The gang is devastated after their tree house collapses. Can architect Frank Gehry help them to rebuild? Everyone in Arthur's chorus group is excited about their upcoming performance in Crown City.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: There is a virus spreading through Lakewood Elementary--it’s new nicknames and it’s changing how everyone treats each other! The playground has been quiet lately--too quiet--and the Tough Customers don't like it one bit.

programme.title: Arthur: My Dad, The Garbage Man/Poor Muffy
programme.desc: Mr. Ratburn's class is taking a field trips to visit parents at their jobs. Francine's not sure she wants the class to know her dad is a garbage man. And a new carpet and a sneezing attack means Muffy must spend the weekend at Francine's.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Snow Mystery/Team Trouble
programme.desc: D.W. saves everything. But her most prized possession is a snowball from last winter. But now it’s disappeared! Then, Arthur, Francine, and Buster must do a report on ancient Rome--but can they work as a team to complete the assignment?

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Battle in Palau (Summer 1944)
programme.desc: As the United States prepared for the invasion of the Philippines, scheduled for late 1944, the tiny Palau Islands had to be taken first.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: D-Day (June 6,1944)
programme.desc: D-Day, the 6th of June--one of the most pivotal moments in world history. In a massive armada of thousands of ships, 3,000,000 allied troops land at Three Beaches in Normandy, France.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Retaking France
programme.desc: Six weeks after the D-Day invasion of the Beaches of Normandy, the allied forces are pushing the Germans back through the French countryside. Town by town is won back as Panzer divisions retreat back to the Meuse River.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Operation Dragoon (August 1944)
programme.desc: The Allies break into France and push the Germans back to their own border.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Liberation of the Paris
programme.desc: Both political and military expediency were factors in the return of the French capital to its people.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Arnhem
programme.desc: The Allies launch an attack designed to push the Germans back to the Rhine River.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY
programme.desc: Gen. Douglas MacArthur's return to the Philippines, and the final push to retake the islands after two years of Japanese occupation.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: The Last Stronghold (November 1944)
programme.desc: American B-29 high-altitude bomber attacks Japan near the end of World War II.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Mount Belvedere
programme.desc: The Battle of the Gothic Line in 1944.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Battle of the Bulge (December 1944)
programme.desc: The December 1944 battle pitting American forces against German Panzer divisions in the Ardennes Forest.

programme.title: Combat Ships

programme.title: Street Sharks

programme.title: Street Sharks

programme.title: Magi-Nation

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: The sharks accidentally get sent to the future where Piranoid has spread an air-born gene-slamming virus which has turned most of the world into subservient Seaviates. Only Bends' great great great grandson and a few other rebels didn't catch the virus.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The New Kid - The Princess And The Frog
programme.desc: When Riff meets a new friend in the park, BJ feels a little left out. BJ goes to great lengths to try to find a new friend for himself. Barney helps BJ see that we don't have to forget old friends when we make new ones.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Who's Your Neighbor?
programme.desc: Through pretend play, Barney and the children learn about their community and the people that help them live safely and happily there.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bonjour Barney!
programme.desc: Emma wants to paint an award-winning painting for the "Art In The Park Show," but she is just isn't satisfied with her artwork. Barney takes her to France to learn how to paint from his friend Pierre.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Spring Into Fun!
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Big Little Day
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and the children discover big and little things in the world around them. And by the end of the day, the kids have learned that big or little, they're all wonderful just the way they are!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps BJ see that we don't forget old friends when we make new ones. Ryan and his Grandpa have a great day in the Park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Play Games!
programme.desc: It's fun and games with Barney and his friends! BJ's favorite way of getting exercise is by playing sports and games. When Baby Bop is shy about trying new games, Barney and his friends show her how tee-rific trying something new can be.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Shredder
programme.desc: The Shredder kidnaps Splinter in an attempt to lure the Turtles to his own cause. In order to rescue Splinter the Turtles must enter the Shredder's mobile fortress and brave its dangerous weaponry.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): A Thing about Rats
programme.desc: Baxter Stockman, a mad scientist, is showing an exterminator his new invention: a rat catching robot called Mousers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Hot Rodding Teenagers from Dimension X
programme.desc: Shredder experiments with the Inter-Dimensional Portal, hoping to contact Krang's' Rock Soldiers and prepare an invasion of Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder & Splintered
programme.desc: Shredder lures Splinter into the Technodrome, this time with the promise that a weapon in his possession can restore the sensei to human form.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Return of the Shredder
programme.desc: Shredder trains students at the Dojo for a crooked Turtles gang. The mock turtles' crime spree starts turning the public against Michelangelo, Raphael, Donatello and Leonardo.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Incredible Shrinking Turtles
programme.desc: In the first of a four-parter, the amazing amphibians search for the segments of the powerful crystal Eye of Sarnoth. Shredder cuts the Turtles down to size, literally.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): It Came from Beneath the Sewers
programme.desc: In the second of a four-parter about the pursuit of the Eye of Sarnoth, the Turtles are attacked by a huge alien plant that is making New York into a jungle.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Mean Machines
programme.desc: The hunt for the Eye of Sarnoth continues in the third of a four-parter with the Turtles in Groucho-like disguises. Shredder hooks up a fragment of the Eye to the computer Omnus.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Curse of the Evil Eye
programme.desc: Shredder is in control of the Eye of Sarnoth, enabling him to transmute matter. Shredder brings to life a dragon which soars through the air with shocked shellbacks Leonardo and Michelangelo aboard.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Case of the Killer Pizzas
programme.desc: The Turtles' favourite food, pizza, is also the source of their problem. Nasty, fanged creatures have been planted in pizza boxes! When the critters crack open their chrysalises, they become enormous.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Fly
programme.desc: Shredder sends April a rare duko plant that renders her unconscious. The Turtles seek a rare leaf that can serve as an antidote.

programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Mt. Pleasant, South Carolina to help the USS Yorktown's crew figure out if the paranormal activity they are experiencing points to their fallen heroes.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Haunted By Heroes
programme.desc: For Grant's second to last case with Ghost Hunters, TAPS revisits one of Grant's favorite locations, Mt. Washington, in New Hampshire. Last time TAPS was here, they caught one of the best EVP's ever.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Dollars And Sense Episode
programme.desc: With her new found independence in tow, Dee Dee enlists Phyllis's help in learning the value of a dollar. Mona and Spencer bump heads when Spencer goes above Mona to sign a new music act she doesn't approve of.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Frozen Assets Episode
programme.desc: Mona's birthday goes sour when she gets an unwelcome present from her mother. While Dee Dee continues to struggle with her life direction, she is presented with a new career option.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Young & The Restless Episode
programme.desc: Mona becomes jealous of her mother when she begins dating a much younger man. Adam begins feeling like a loser when he realizes everyone is accomplishing their goals except him.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Wrong Side of the Tracks
programme.desc: Maya (Golden Brooks) fears that Jabari (Kendre Berry) is growing up too fast after she and Darnell (Khalil Kain) witness an interaction between him and a young girl.

programme.title: Girlfriends: I Want My Baby Back
programme.desc: Maya (Golden Brooks) fears that Jabari (Kendre Berry) is growing up too fast after she and Darnell (Khalil Kain) witness an interaction between him and a young girl.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Hot for Preacher
programme.desc: When Lynn (Persia White) meets Eldon Perry (guest star Kadeem Hardison), an attractive guy at a club where she is singing, but she becomes conflicted about dating him when she discovers he is a Baptist minister.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Time to Man Up
programme.desc: During an evening out, Maya and Darnell befriend Alicia and Ray a new couple living in their neighborhood. When Maya witnesses an intense moment between the couple, she suspects that Ray is abusing Alicia.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Willie Or Won't He III: This Time It's Personal
programme.desc: After years of on-again, off-again dating and a pair of broken engagements, William and Monica finally tie the knot. At the reception, Robert Dooling, one of William’s biggest clients, thanks him for delaying his honeymoon to oversee an important merger.

programme.title: Girlfriends: What Had Happened Was...
programme.desc: After Aaron and Joan experience an uncomfortable moment when they run into one of Aaron's ex-girlfriends, they decide to discuss their past relationships with one another to avoid future awkward moments.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Church Lady
programme.desc: After splitting from Eldon over his objection to pre-marital sex, Lynn longs to get back together. She feels they share a special connection, but Eldon doesn’t appreciate Lynn’s attempts to seduce him.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: UNFORGIVEN
programme.desc: Nineteen years ago, Kim’s birth divided Nikki and her father; now, only Kim can mend their family feud.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Get Out of This House
programme.desc: When an aggressive spirit stalks a young family, PRS is called in to investigate. When it is determined that the source of the haunting may have been unknowingly invited in, Ryan races to identify and hopefully defeat the entity before it's too late.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil in Jersey
programme.desc: PRS delves deep into the pine barrens of the Garden State to separate myth from reality about the so-called "Jersey Devil." Accompanied by a cryptozoologist the team interviews eye witnesses and experts in search of the truth.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Who Is the Lurking Man?
programme.desc: PRS travels to Newcastle, CA to investigate a house with paranormal forces so strong, the family has cleared out. Ryan believes the Native American land may hold the key to the mystery and leads the team in a fight to reclaim a scared family's house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: They Only Come Out at Night
programme.desc: Once night falls in a quaint?New England Town, a police officer's family is terrorized by demons.?PRS arrives just in time with the family ready to vacate their family home, rather than suffer the advances of these spirit creatures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Drowned
programme.desc: Kim and her family have been frightened out of their seaside Maryland home. Multiple family members have reported sightings of children with purple lips and strange noises emanating from the nearby creek.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Invitation to Evil
programme.desc: Paula and her husband Mike are under siege by a purported shadow demon in their North Carolina home. Paula has witnessed a toddler bed levitating and heard deep growls. Michelle, Ryan and the team uncover the shocking truth behind the haunting.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Cemetery
programme.desc: PRS visits a gothic graveyard, where a jealous spirit seems to be preying on the newlywed wife of the cemetery's caretaker. Ryan traces the haunting to a mysterious, unclaimed cremation urn on the grounds.

programme.title: Paranormal State: If I Should Die...
programme.desc: Proven paranormal investigator Ken Arrington leads a new class of characters as they try to help a family cope with what appears to be a demonic spirit in their home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Haunted Piano
programme.desc: Ryan and the PRS team are called in when unlucky antique collectors unwittingly bring a paranormally-infested piano into their home. The team attempts to dismantle and destroy the offending instrument.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Southern Discomfort At Sweetwater Mansion
programme.desc: PRS heads to the Deep South to investigate a haunted Antebellum Mansion in disrepair. The caretaker and volunteers at the property have many a tale to tell of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Night Terrors
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Most Haunted: GLOUCESTER PRISON Pt2
programme.desc: The second part of Yvette Fielding and the team's investigation of the imposing and abandoned Gloucester Prison.

programme.title: Most Haunted: GLOUCESTER PRISON Pt3
programme.desc: The third part of Yvette Fielding and the team's investigation into the very haunted and abandoned Gloucester Prison. With the team splitting up the activity rises and something is trying to stop Yvette and Glen.

programme.title: Most Haunted: SECRET LOCATION PT1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding leads team in a violent, secret investigation. Place's name and location concealed due to extreme haunting. Little history, aggressive entities a mystery. Can they reveal the darkness and face the unknown?

programme.title: Most Haunted: SECRET LOCATION PT2
programme.desc: Most Haunted's deadliest investigation, Part 2. Spirits emerging, team's resolve tested as darkness envelops. Growing fear, team's safety at stake. Can they continue?

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Phoenix
programme.desc: The IMF foils the attempts of a once-powerful communist to regain power.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Trial By Fury
programme.desc: The IMF goes to the aid of a friendly South American government which has been overthrown by revolutionaries.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Recovery
programme.desc: The IMF takes the task of recovering a secret fail-safe device.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Mercenaries

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Heir Apparent
programme.desc: Cinnamon poses as a 50-year-old blind princess, heiress to a Balkan kingdom.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: To Pawn or Not To Pawn
programme.desc: On the brink of a major decision, Ton and Allen face-off with Carolyn at an auction in Covina. They win a "special effects unit" that contains big machines for crazy stunt work. The guys decide the fate of the shop.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Louisiana Purchase
programme.desc: In Louisiana, Ton and Allen encounter some salty locals at a shipping crate auction, and navigate choppy waters at a boat auction. After spending a lot of cash, they find a tactical blast shield and a bass fishing boat.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Once a Pawn a Time
programme.desc: Ton and Allen discover that owning a pawn shop is way more trouble than they expected. With bills stacking up, even an antique ammo collection and some classic football helmets may not be enough to put the guys in the black.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rock-et to Me!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen end up in a turf war at a Hollywood auction and at odds with each other over whether to gamble on what could be an antique slot machine. Allen attempts to fly a jetpack.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Bringing Ghosts In
programme.desc: Learn what happens when ghosts from eras past cross into our realm.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Terrifying Visions

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: A Sense of Evil

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Multiple Spirit Disorder
programme.desc: Watch as spirits and shadowy figures plague three different family’s lives.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Voices of the Dead

programme.title: A Haunting: Masks Of Terror

programme.title: A Haunting: The Attic

programme.title: A Haunting: Stalked by Evil

programme.title: A Haunting: Tunnel Of Death
programme.desc: Candace and John St. Clair explore a haunted tunnel with a gruesome history where slaves were buried alive. Stealthily, an uninvited guest follows them home. Attacked by the entity, they invite paranormal experts to investigate and cleanse the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: A Haunting in Ireland
programme.desc: The Fahey family’s new addition stirs up psychic energy of a crime committed years ago.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Sean Vincent Gillis from Louisiana was arrested on suspicion of killing five women, but during police questioning, he ultimately confessed to the brutal murders of three more people.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When Kim Allen is found murdered in her home, her estranged and abusive husband is the likely suspect. A risky bluff by detectives takes the case in a surprising direction.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Detectives grill the wife of a man found shot dead on his Iowa farm after they discover she had an affair with one of his friends. Can they pressurise the pair to tell the truth?

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a divorced mother is found murdered in her home, the police investigate and discover that she had rather an unusual array of people involved in her life.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Devoted mother Heather Strong disappears, leaving her estranged husband Josh to care for her two children, as he also falls under suspicion.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives but they are so reliant that they are blind to the imminent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Patrice Evra

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Iain Lawrence
programme.desc: Ian and Sally Lawrence were a glamorous couple, and they looked like they had it all. But their marriage suffered when Ian’s star started to fall as Sally’s career rocketed. And when the couple suffered a terrible car crash, only one came out alive.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Chaz Higgs
programme.desc: High-profile politician Kathy Augustine married nurse Chaz Higgs after a whirlwind romance. They were an unlikely match, and when their marriage hit the rocks, Chaz decided to use his medical training to commit an undetectable crime.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Denise Williams
programme.desc: Denise Williams was devastated when her husband Mike disappeared on a hunting trip. He was feared drowned. But Mike’s mother Cheryl didn’t buy it, and after years of relentless campaigning, she finally uncovered the truth about her son’s death.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Paul Novak
programme.desc: Paul Novak was a thrill-seeking paramedic who loved the hustle and bustle of the city. His wife Catherine was a homemaker and volunteer who preferred small town life. Unable to reconcile their differences, Paul decided to plan the perfect crime.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Janbaz Tarin
programme.desc: Raneem Oudeh came to the UK from Syria to escape war, looking forward to a brighter future for herself and her son. Everything was falling into place until she met Janbaz Tarin, a man who saw no boundary between love, obsession, and extreme violence.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: George Worgan
programme.desc: Kelly and George Worgan looked like the perfect parents, playing happy families on Facebook with pictures of days out. But behind closed doors, they had financial struggles and rows. When their marriage ended in murder, no one saw it coming.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Nightmare
programme.desc: Every woman’s worst nightmare comes to life when a bearded sexual predator starts attacking women in the safety of their own apartments while they are sleeping.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Saint
programme.desc: A frat boy lures a girl to his house with the promise of a party, but once there it turns out he has ulterior motives. When the girl says no, he violently attacks her. A string of violence is finally uncovered, revealing a sinister trail of violence.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Danger in the Woods
programme.desc: Three teenagers accompany a deliveryman to a densely wooded area for a drinking party that, before long, becomes a nightmare. Things take a terrifying turn when one of teens attacks the others.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hate Crime
programme.desc: A young Orthodox Jewish man is in Pittsburgh to celebrate Passover with family when he is gunned down simply because of the way he is dressed.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hostage
programme.desc: A man robs an armoured car at gunpoint and holds a massage parlor worker hostage. As police investigate, they find startling links to a series of robberies, all taking place during the Christmas season.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Secret Life
programme.desc: In Calgary, Alberta, a beautiful Ethiopian woman is found brutally strangled. The victim’s husband seems genuinely distraught over his wife’s death, but there is something strangely suspicious about him.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Flying Bandit
programme.desc: In 1986, an American becomes one of Canada’s most prolific bank and jewellery bandits after he pulls off one of the biggest heists in Canadian history. As more robberies occur, the police become more determined to catch the mastermind behind them all.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Cold Hit
programme.desc: In 1994, a troubled single mother is found raped and murdered in her apartment. Was it one of the volatile men in her life? All possible suspects are eliminated and the case goes cold for three years, until a nine-year old girl is brutally raped.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Kidnapped
programme.desc: A wealthy Asian girl is kidnapped in Vancouver. When the kidnappers make the fateful error of using the young girl’s cell phone, police are able to track their movements and capture the assailants.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Lone Wolf
programme.desc: Two murders of mothers in their own homes send shock-waves through a normally quiet and friendly town where everybody leaves their doors unlocked. The crimes go unsolved until twenty-eight years later.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6

programme.desc: General Burkhalter comes to Stalag 13 determined to marry off his sister to Klink. Hogan has to find a planted German agent in the Underground.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Heroes need to get both a member of the French resistance and some bullet-proof vests out of Stalag 13.

programme.desc: With light from distant stars taking millions of years to reach us, how long might it take for alien life to answer any communication sent into space?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Nearly three hundred million people worldwide claim to have been abducted by aliens. Many report being subjected to torturous medical experiments. Others return with unwelcome reminders of their ordeal. Are aliens creating human hybrids?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: In the 1960s we too our first steps into a vast new realm—bound for the Moon. But NASA astronauts would soon find they weren’t the only ones out there.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed

programme.title: Dynasty: Circumstantial Evidence

programme.desc: Tensions between Krystle and Blake mount as their suspicions of one another grow. Claudia regrets sleeping with Adam. Dominique derails Alexis' attempt to buyout her company, but is unable to stop Brady's divorce proceedings.

programme.title: Dynasty: Life and Death

programme.title: Dynasty: Parental Consent
programme.desc: Alexis attempts to persuade King Galen to allow a marriage between Amanda and his son. She sweetens the offer by suggesting his country would receive a portion of Colbyco's revenues. Dominique advises Krystle to reconcile with Blake.

programme.desc: Nev and Max are contacted by Carmen who is sounding the alarm on behalf of her cousin, Antwane. He's been in a three-year romance with a man named Tony that he met on a telephone chat line.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Fly
programme.desc: Shredder sends April a rare duko plant that renders her unconscious. The Turtles seek a rare leaf that can serve as an antidote.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Invasion of the Punk Frogs
programme.desc: Mutagen, sent by Krang from Dimension X, changes four Florida frogs into half-human creatures four and a half feet tall. Shredder, training them in his evil ways, names them Attila the Frog, Genghis Frog, Rasputin the Mad Frog and Napoleon Bonafrog.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Splinter No More
programme.desc: Michelangelo senses that their mentor is "mondo depressed" and Donatello finds a way of changing back Splinter the rat to Yoshi the man.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): New York's Shiniest
programme.desc: Shredder taps into New York's computers to steal plans for robots and creates an army of robots to destroy the Turtles and loot the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Teenagers from Dimension X
programme.desc: Neutrino teens Kala, Zak and Eask arrive on Earth and alert the Turtles to Shredder's latest plan to make "mindless zombies" of the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Catwoman from Channel 6
programme.desc: A matter transporter results in strange happenings including TV reporter April O'Neil being put into a cat-like state and a tiger chasing the Turtles and Splinter, their mentor-rat.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Return of the Technodrome
programme.desc: To bring the Technodrome back to Earth, Shredder is instructed to take over the Niagara Falls hydroelectric station.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Beneath These Streets
programme.desc: While the Turtles, in disguise, are at a movie, Shredder interrupts a press conference to steal a new medi-laser.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles on Trial
programme.desc: While the Turtles go on a talk show to prove their innocence to the world, Krang steals a robot and some Solarbenite from a military warehouse, with the intention of destroying the Turtles himself.

programme.desc: If a single car brakes lightly, can it cause a ripple that triggers a major traffic jam? Is it better to stay in one lane in heavy traffic instead of changing lanes?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 178
programme.desc: Can a swimmer increase his chances of surviving an underwater explosion by floating at the surface? Did armies in ancient China use paper armor that was as effective as steel?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 5
programme.desc: Myths tested: How long can you survive in an underground coffin? Does cola have special properties?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 156
programme.desc: Are the Storm Chasers' vehicles fit to withstand force 5 tornado speeds? Is it possible to build a personal tornado protection device?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 147
programme.desc: Can you escape an explosive shockwave by diving in water? Can you make a car bulletproof using nothing but phone books?

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics)
programme.desc: George and his family spend a tortuous night in a cottage haunted by Native Americans and bootleggers. Wayne Newton is paid a surprise visit by the ghost of his dear friend Elvis Presley while performing in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics)
programme.desc: Bloody visions of a violent tragedy haunt Marisa's childhood; Jimmie runs out of gas on an icy, North Dakota road and encounters a mysterious apparition.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "It came from near the door!"
programme.desc: The 'Are You Haunted' team travel to South Yorkshire to investigate a haunted building that dates to the late 18th century. With reports of a mysterious figure being seen, footsteps being heard, and possible poltergeist activity, how will they get on?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "The heebie-jeebies!"
programme.desc: The 'Are You Haunted' team head northwest in this episode, and to a venue that counts reports of a mysterious black shape, and phantom screams as just two of the many incidents reported there. What will the team encounter?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Is anybody there?"
programme.desc: The Are You Haunted team heads to Wales, where they are given rare access to a restricted part of a venue. What will the team find during their overnight investigation, in a building that stretches back hundreds of years?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Shocking Statement
programme.desc: Today on Steve Wilkos, Vanessa reveals a secret she's been hiding from her boyfriend and Joel takes a DNA test to determine if he fathered Melissa's son!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, I Think He's Gay
programme.desc: Monique’s friend claims that Adrian advertised himself on a “Gay for Pay” website. Then, pregnant Tyeasha suspects David of cheating on her with men. What will the polygraph say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Tragic Accident
programme.desc: Rebecca left her baby with fiancé James and his mother Adeline, only to discover that her baby was hospitalized. Rebecca suspects that James is responsible. Adeline blames her for the baby’s death!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Teen Mom Murderer?
programme.desc: At 17, Janelle's infant son died from serious injuries. She was sentenced to 3 years in prison for reckless homicide, but claims she's innocent. What will her polygraph results say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She Said She'd Drown the Baby
programme.desc: Devon slipped into a coma and is on life support. But before he fell into a coma, he told his mother that his ex Alisha said he did not father their son. Alisha denies ever saying this and feels his whole family has turned their backs on her.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: How Could You Cover for Him?
programme.desc: Gina believes that her daughter’s boyfriend Efrain is abusing her grandson. Her daughter wants to prove that Efrain is innocent, but her father Raul suspects she is covering for Efrain.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Impromptu Performance

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Neurotic Detective

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: For the chefs' next challenge, Chef Ramsay pits the teams against one another, preparing authentic Chinese dishes as prominent Chinese Chef Shirley Chung is brought in to judge their finished dishes.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The seven remaining chefs are called down to the dining room to discover two ice dancers performing a routine. Chef Ramsay explains ice dancing can be romantic, just as dessert can be. For their challenge they must cook an extraordinary dessert.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: In the first challenge, the final six chefs break through a case, retrieving a random ingredient they will have to cook with. The second challenge has each chef cooking with the same four ingredients. The third challenge is a surf and turf challenge.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The five chefs compete in Chef Ramsay's Taste It, Now Make It challenge, recreating his intricate eggs Benedict dish. Later, the fish station struggles at dinner service, leaving the chef in charge of it in real danger of being sent home.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: When The Trail Goes Cold
programme.desc: This episodes involves the disappearance of 62-year-old Kaye Stewart, a woman who went missing while on a short walk on June 13th, 2005.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Looking for Justice
programme.desc: This week, for the first time ever, the prime suspect in a murder enquiry has turned to Sensing Murder for help.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost for Words
programme.desc: Spirited teenager Jayne Furlong dreamed of becoming a child psychologist - instead, she ended up a prostitute. In 1993, 17 year old Jayne vanished from her patch on Auckland's Karangahape Road.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Psychics Revealed - Special
programme.desc: Behind the scenes with the psychics on the show.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of the Dark
programme.desc: Described as a brutal execution, 46-year-old grandmother Chattrice Maihi-Carroll was found naked, stabbed to death in her New Zealand home in 2008. There were multiple suspects and everything seemed resolved following the arrest of a neighbour.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Haunted By Heroes

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen vs. Ton

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.desc: Ton and Allen quarrel over bidding strategy at a rare auction on Catalina Island and must race against the clock to unload a one man submersible that could be worth big money… if they can make it work.
